overview: ReviewGuard AI is a fake product review detection platform powered by AI. Users can analyze reviews by pasting text, uploading website screenshots (OCR + image authenticity check), or entering product page URLs (bulk analysis of all reviews grouped by verdict). All analyses are saved per user with separate history tabs, and a dashboard tracks usage statistics.
features: Text review analysis with AI-powered fake detection
Image screenshot analysis with OCR and image manipulation detection
Product URL analysis fetching and analyzing all reviews on a page
Separate history tabs for Text, Image, and URL analyses
Dashboard with stats: total analyses, fake vs genuine counts
